bullets.text: Built Python services on AWS and improved deployment speed 20%.
Automated infrastructure with Terraform for platform teams.
Improved reliability for backend services running on AWS.
Mentored engineers on Python service ownership.
Led platform adoption for Terraform workflows.
Built Python APIs on AWS and improved reliability 18%.
Automated AWS infrastructure using Terraform and improved release consistency.
